reviews.review_description:
I love the game could use some work but love the idea and how the moderators actually play the game and interact with players and are very nice but the laser maze does need an exit and the game gets constant updates like got the game today and there wasn’t any game modes 10 minutes later there’s a laser maze

Overall love it

THIS GAME IS THE BEST GAME I EVER SEEN 
[PLS READ OWNER] I want to be moderator because it can help the game out and I have a yt channel named khalebvr
